name: Magnesium
summary: Magnesium is most useful when low intake, deficiency risk, muscle tension, or sleep-quality issues overlap.
description: Mineral repletion support for sleep quality, muscle relaxation, and deficiency contexts.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: Magnesium may support mild anxiety or sleep quality in selected adults, especially where magnesium status is low, but evidence is heterogeneous.
claimMap.notes: Magnesium may support mild anxiety or sleep quality in selected adults, especially where magnesium status is low, but evidence is heterogeneous.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: varied magnesium dose/form; some combo products

dosage: Varied by formulation; do not infer one universal dose. Common clinical supplementation studies often use hundreds of mg/day elemental magnesium; specific form and elemental dose must be surfaced when available. | Oral magnesium supplements; forms vary. Magnesium L-threonate has separate emerging sleep data and should not be generalized to all magnesium forms.
typical_dosage: Varied by formulation; do not infer one universal dose. Common clinical supplementation studies often use hundreds of mg/day elemental magnesium; specific form and elemental dose must be surfaced when available. | Oral magnesium supplements; forms vary.
